headline: Is PepsiCo, Inc. (PEP) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PEP a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on PepsiCo, Inc. on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PEP. PepsiCo, Inc.’s share was trading at $160.15 as of March 11th. PEP’s trailing and forward P/E were 26.69 and 18.59, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. PepsiCo, Inc. […]
